title: Dioskouroi #1359
definition:
1) Castor and Pollux, were the twin sons of Jupiter and Leda, and
    were regarded as the tutelary divinities of sailors
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) Castor and Pollux, were the twin sons of Jupiter and Leda, and
    were regarded as the tutelary divinities of sailors

    NASB:  the Dioscuri, twin sons of Zeus (Castor and Pollux):
